description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof with a light gray finish and red brick exterior walls. The front facade includes a large wooden garage door, a central arched double-door entryway with glass panes, and several symmetrically arranged windows with wooden frames. The rear side has a wide set of folding glass doors opening to the outside, alongside additional windows. The side elevations are simpler, each with a pair of windows and small utility openings. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric symmetry. The structure appears to be a single-story suburban home with a modern-traditional blend.
description: A single-story brick house with a steep gable roof, wooden-framed windows, a garage, and a central arched entryway. The design is symmetrical and blends modern and traditional elements.
description_view_0: This side shows two wooden-framed windows and two small utility openings set in a red brick wall beneath the steep gable roof.
description_view_1: The front view features a large wooden garage door, a central arched double-door entryway with glass panes, and three symmetrically placed windows.
description_view_2: This side displays two windows and two small utility features, with a single window centered below, all set in a plain brick wall.
description_view_3: The rear view highlights a wide set of folding glass doors and two windows, providing access and light to the interior.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched double-door with glass panes, no porch or steps, flanked by windows and a large garage door
